sections.paragraph: (perhaps “two resting-places,” for שׁוּנַיִם, compare עָנֵם for עֵינַיִם), [Shunem], pr.n. of a town in the tribe of Issachar, Jos 19:18 1Sa 28:4 2Ki 4:8 prob. Sulem of Eusebius (see σουβήμ), five miles south of Tabor: [prob. now Sôlam, سوَام Rob. iii. 169]. Gentile noun שׁוּנַמִּי, f. -ית 1Ki 1:3 2:17 2Ki 4:12.
